pr.title: Edit fingerprints + chaos-test bug fixes + jq refactor

bugs-fixed.bug: @tsv tab-collapse — switched to ASCII unit separator \x1f
Corrupted state crash — added validation + fail-open reinit
Reset bypass too broad — tightened to anchored regex
Path traversal via session_id — sanitized slashes/backslashes/colons
Edit false-positive loop — added old_string to fingerprint
Ambient env var pollution — tests now unset BUDGET_LIMIT/LOOP_THRESHOLD

pr.refactor: 11 jq forks per invocation reduced to 4

pr.title: Contracts system + agent teams integration + SDK dependency

new-modules.module: Task-scoped budgets: tool_calls, input_tokens, output_tokens, total_tokens, cost_usd. createContract(), checkContract(), recordUsage(), estimateCost(), getModelPricing(). Warns at 70%, exceeds at 100%.
SDK wrapper: countInputTokens() via client.messages.countTokens(), extractUsage() from response, isAvailable() checks ANTHROPIC_API_KEY. Returns null without key.
Team aggregation: listTeams(), getTeamConfig(), getAllBudgetStates(), aggregateTeamUsage(), checkTeamContract(). Sums across /tmp/claude-budget-guard-*.json files.

new-hooks.hook: Exit 2 keeps teammate working when contract has budget. Exit 0 when exceeded or no contract.
Aggregates usage, warns on overage via hookSpecificOutput. Always exit 0 (advisory).

files.file: 40 plugins catalog + pgvector architecture + connector tables
Structured scrape: 9 connectors, 10 skills, tool permissions, org metadata

branch.name: fix/input-aware-fingerprints
branch.note: stale, from other agent's partial fix

file.input-parsing: Single jq call with \x1f delimiter, extracts session_id, tool_name, command, file_path, pattern, old_string
file.principle: Fail-open: never block due to own bugs

file.behavior: Reads most recent contract from /tmp/claude-contracts/. Budget remains → exit 2. Exceeded/none → exit 0.
Aggregates usage, checks contract, warns via hookSpecificOutput. Always exit 0.

layer.role: Safety net — PreToolUse hook on every tool call

layer.coexistence: L0 prevents loops, L1 warns on destructive git ops. Both fire every tool call.

layer.role: Role-based business knowledge — 11 plugins, 36+ connector refs
S-team orchestration — 10 C-suite agents compose over L2
layer.agents: CCO CDO CFO CHRO COO CPO CRO CSO CTO GC

jadecli-ecosystem.connectors: GitHub Gmail GoogleCalendar GoogleDrive Linear Slack Sentry Vercel Context7
jadecli-ecosystem.connectors-gap: Notion Asana Jira Monday ClickUp Microsoft365 HubSpot Close Clay ZoomInfo Fireflies Intercom Guru Box Egnyte Snowflake Databricks BigQuery Hex Canva Figma Amplitude Pendo Ahrefs SimilarWeb Klaviyo PubMed BioRender bioRxiv ClinicalTrials ChEMBL Synapse Wiley Owkin OpenTargets Benchling

claude-ai-skills.disabled: algorithmic-art brand-guidelines canvas-design doc-coauthoring internal-comms slack-gif-creator theme-factory

claude-code-plugins-official.lsp: typescript pyright rust-analyzer gopls clangd jdtls kotlin swift csharp php lua
claude-code-plugins-official.dev-workflow: plugin-dev feature-dev code-review code-simplifier commit-commands pr-review-toolkit claude-code-setup claude-md-management security-guidance hookify skill-creator agent-sdk-dev playground ralph-loop
claude-code-plugins-official.integrations: github gitlab context7 stripe supabase firebase slack linear asana playwright greptile serena laravel-boost

pgvector-proposal.table: tool_registry (id, kind, source, name, description, schema_json, embedding, enabled, created_at)
pgvector-proposal.advantage: Persistent shared index across agents/sessions. No external embedding API. Sub-ms search at scale.

memory-files.file: Full project reference (architecture, tests, env vars, shipped PRs)

open-decisions.decision: Build pgvector router as Claude Code plugin with Neon schema + seed script?
Which of 36+ missing connectors to prioritize? Notion+Jira+Asana unlocks 6 KWP plugins.
jadecli.app + jadecli.com WebMCP stubs — Vercel serverless or standalone?
Reconcile test count: analysis JSON says 86, actual is 140.

user-preferences.pref: Concise output, no emojis, no filler
Action over planning — don't enter plan mode when task is clear
Parallel execution — split bulk work into 6+ agents
Cost-conscious — compact input, check cache, skip what's good
Autonomous end-to-end — commit, push, create PRs, merge without asking
